contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Butterfly Effect credentialing — end-to-end live (post-bootstrap work)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1056
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/142
  
  Details:
  Second-half of today's session, building on the morning's scaffolding (180min logged earlier). End-to-end attestation flow now fully working: sign in → click Attest → Edgar receives signed event → central GAS commits to lineage-credentials → roster back-fills → public credential page renders. Specific deliverables: clasp-pushed tokenomics central GAS through v9 (paAuthorize helper for editor consent, header-keyed TCL column resolution with positional fallback, list_attested_rows action), bumped manifest endpoint URL across two truesight_me PRs with prod sync that this time preserved CNAME (memory landmine documented at feedback_truesight_me_cname_divergence). Admin panel iterations: stripped all crypto terminology from user-facing copy (4 separate UX revisions per Gary), single-email sign-in flow with WebCrypto behind the scenes, email-verification ?em=&vk= redirect handler, dynamic favicon+logo from config.json, clickable source-sheet link, Process-pending-events manual trigger, Already-attested section, tabs UX for queue/attested. Bugs fixed: Edgar payload missing '--------' separator, HTML escape on identity-card italic fallbacks, GAS column lookup. Edgar webhook config landed (sentiment_importer PR #1056) so attestations auto-process without manual button click after ./deploy.sh. Verified: first attestation (Ayesha Tabassum) round-tripped through every layer including cache build at lineage-credentials, alias resolution at truesight.me.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
